SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "Agreement") is made as of the 5th day of October, 2023.

PARTIES:
1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678B), residing at 123 Orchard Road, #10-01, Singapore 238888, Contact: +65 9123 4567, Email: tanweiming@example.sg

AND

XYZ PTE. LTD. (UEN: 202312345G), a company incorporated in Singapore with its registered office at 101 Raffles Place, #17-01, Singapore 048623.

WHEREAS, the parties agree to invest the sum of SGD 1,500,000 into XYZ PTE. LTD. for the purpose of furthering the business objectives outlined in this Agreement.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
